channel.title: Twitter - @elonmusk
channel.description: 自动生成的Twitter RSS - 最后更新: 2026-06-14 14:37 UTC | 来源实例: https://xcancel.com

item.title: @elonmusk: Today is a good day
@elonmusk: Looking forward to taking our exciting partnership with Nvidia to the next-level
item.description: Looking forward to taking our exciting partnership with Nvidia to the next-level

item.title: @elonmusk: The vibes at the SpaceXAI office in Palo Alto are immaculate today
item.description: The vibes at the SpaceXAI office in Palo Alto are immaculate today

item.title: @elonmusk: Pessimists sound smart. Optimists build the world.
item.description: Pessimists sound smart. Optimists build the world.

item.title: @elonmusk: Last week, I attended the@ElonMuskand Jamie Dimon@SpaceXdiscussion at J.P. Morgan. Jamie asked Elon ...
item.description: Last week, I attended the@ElonMuskand Jamie Dimon@SpaceXdiscussion at J.P. Morgan. Jamie asked Elon how he had changed over the past 20 years as a leader and a person. Elon's answer wasn't about success. It was about what's next. He said he has learned a lot...has made mistakes and still has much to learn... Then he added, “I think maybe the future AI will say ‘not bad for a human’." Elon, thank you so much for what you've done for humanity. Congrats to you,@Gwynne_Shotwell,@BretWJ, and the entire team. What is even more remarkable... this feels like day one, that you are just getting started. PS. When people ask "what is the next SpaceX and who is the next Elon?" Simple answer. There is NO NEXT!!! Elon Musk is a mensch!

item.title: @elonmusk: Haha this is awesome. Elon agreed to the "greenshoe" IPO option but only if the bankers and team all...
item.description: Haha this is awesome. Elon agreed to the "greenshoe" IPO option but only if the bankers and team all wore actual green shoes 😂🔥 (A "greenshoe" is a standard IPO provision that allows underwriters to sell up to ~15% more shares than originally planned if demand is strong, helping stabilize the stock price in early trading.)

item.title: @elonmusk: The Falcon 1 is small potatoes now, but reporting on its development is really what got me hooked on...
item.description: The Falcon 1 is small potatoes now, but reporting on its development is really what got me hooked on@SpaceX. Loved the tales of a bunch of 20 somethings stuck on Kwajalein Atoll trying to make a rocket fly. The company ended up being one tiny error on the fourth launch from going out of business, but it somehow launched and survived. Am still so amused by@elonmuskreading rocket books post PayPal and now getting to this point. Seems just about impossible. Is a shame there has not been a movie made about these times. Hollywood kinda hates Elon and doesn't want to see it made, but it's the ultimate next chapter to The Right Stuff.

item.title: @elonmusk: Oh yes, I remember that Bond film where the villain decarbonized the auto industry, brought fast int...
item.description: Oh yes, I remember that Bond film where the villain decarbonized the auto industry, brought fast internet to everyone on the planet, and helped paralyzed people interact with the world again.

item.title: @elonmusk: Starship is a very big rocket
item.description: Starship is a very big rocket

item.title: @elonmusk: When most companies' opening remarks during their IPOs were about profit, today it hits something di...
item.description: When most companies' opening remarks during their IPOs were about profit, today it hits something different. It is hope. The once-inspiring future that excited us when we were young but that we dropped after growing up—we have found it again.

item.title: @elonmusk: Within ~5 years, probably ~5 times as many satellites as rest of world
item.description: Within ~5 years, probably ~5 times as many satellites as rest of world

item.title: @elonmusk: Did he stab someone ?
@elonmusk: They will
@elonmusk: About 5 years ago, Elon was giving@Erdayastronauta tour of the Starbase launchpad. A worker at the s...
item.description: About 5 years ago, Elon was giving@Erdayastronauta tour of the Starbase launchpad. A worker at the site walks up, hugs him, and says: “We’re going to make it.” He’s probably a millionaire now.

item.title: @elonmusk: Science is not a process, a credential, or an institution. It is the unflinching pursuit of truth, c...
item.description: Science is not a process, a credential, or an institution. It is the unflinching pursuit of truth, carried out by the few, co-opted by the many.

item.title: @elonmusk: I calculated Tesla FSD's reaction time
item.description: I calculated Tesla FSD's reaction time

item.title: @elonmusk: SpaceX President Gwynne Shotwell on CNBC yesterday on Elon Musk: "I think he is very misunderstood a...
item.description: SpaceX President Gwynne Shotwell on CNBC yesterday on Elon Musk: "I think he is very misunderstood across the board. I want people to know him. In fact, he participated in some of the discussions that we’ve had over the last couple of weeks with investors. The investors left saying: ‘I had no idea that is the man.’ I said: That’s the man I’ve worked for 24 years. I love him." Gwynne joined SpaceX in 2002 as the company’s 11th employee. She’s awesome. What a journey.

item.title: @elonmusk: Tunneling in 3 geologies in 3 cities - Las Vegas clay/caliche, Nashville limestone, and Bastrop sand...
item.description: Tunneling in 3 geologies in 3 cities - Las Vegas clay/caliche, Nashville limestone, and Bastrop sandy clay
